title: Pump.fun Token Scanner
description: Monitor pump.fun's bonding curve program on Solana mainnet via GoldRush event logs — fetch the current market cap in USD, SOL held in the bonding curve, percentage progress toward graduation (~$69K), and the top 10 buyers ranked by SOL spent for any pump.fun token mint address. Subscribe to the graduation event stream to know the exact block when a token migrates to Raydium and acquires its first real liquidity pool — essential for launch-tracker UIs and autonomous sniper agents.
useCase: Build a real-time pump.fun launch tracker that monitors bonding curve progress and fires an alert the moment a token graduates to Raydium with initial liquidity.

keyParams.address: The pump.fun bonding curve program address or token mint address
keyParams.tokenAddress: SPL token mint address of the pump.fun token to scan
keyParams.page_size: Number of transactions to analyze per page (max 100)
keyParams.block_signed_at_asc: Sort ascending to track bonding curve progression chronologically
